name: playwright-typescript-framework
description: E2E Web UI Automation Framework using Playwright Test and TypeScript

scripts.allure:clear: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['allure-results', 'allure-report', 'test-results', 'playwright-report'].forEach(d => fs.rmSync(d, { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.test:allure: npm run allure:clear && node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); spawnSync('npx', ['playwright', 'test'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); spawnSync('npm', ['run', 'allure:generate'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true });"
